name: I'm Not Sleepy
short_description: In this fast-paced arena roguelike, you're a clown, a baker, a robot, a ballerina... or maybe you're just asleep! Battle hordes of bizarre baddies, collect curious items, and select powerful upgrades to enhance the unique abilities of your growing roster of playable characters.
detailed_description:
Become Your Worst Nightmare's Worst Nightmare


Live the dream! Dash, hack, slash, and yo-yo your way through this deceptively charming, devilishly challenging roguelike bullet-hell. Carve through baddies and bosses with dozens of unique abilities. Collect and stack items to augment your stats and enhance your skills, and unlock an excessive cast of playable characters.

In this game, you can:

  • slap enemies with a fish
  • create a storm to throw pies at your foes
  • weaponize a laser pointer
  • summon an army of bees
  • break some eggs
  • command an armada of space stations
  • blow bubbles
  • howl at the moon
  • ...and much more!

Just a Quick Nap


Featuring runs shorter than 30 minutes, enjoy wild builds and zero-to-hero roguelike catharsis in a fraction of the time. Light meta-progression ensures you will find the game beatable from your very first run.

Broken Dreams


Collect and stack dozens of items, from beehives and balloons, to scarecrows and swords. Choose upgrades to modify your abilities and stats as you craft outrageously broken builds.

You, Who?


From an angler with a fishing hook to a clown with juggling clubs, unlock and master more than 20 playable characters, each with different stats and abilities. If you enjoy discovering new ways to play, there's plenty to wrap your mind around here.

Give Yourself A Hard Time


Progress through dozens of escalating difficulty levels, choosing the modifiers that best suit your playstyle.
